name: revit_list_import_instances
description: List ImportInstance elements in the active project, detect duplicate view-specific CAD imports, and write a text report beside the project file.

output_path.description: Optional path for the report file (defaults to <project>-ListOfImportedData.txt beside the RVT)

notes: Writes a log file and shows a TaskDialog with an option to open it in Notepad. Unsaved projects use Default-ListOfImportedData.txt in the current directory.
